meaning: adv.决不,毫不 pron.一个也没有,毫无
examples: None of them could sing in tune.
She has lost none of her naivety.
None of the passengers were badly hurt.
They then began to divide into embryos, but none grew past the six-cell stage.
None more so than Yasar Buyukanit, who took over from General Ozkok last year.
